name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO holds board meetings with Chiefs, each of whom runs a council of specialists. Research → Product → Architecture → Security → Execution → Quality → DevOps → Docs → Legal → Marketing → Strategy → People-ops → Audit → Evaluation → Red-Team. Security-first (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10) by default; adversarial-defense-first (OWASP ASI Top 10 2025) via the Red-Team Council. Ships to GitHub. v0.2 adds: durable cross-project memory (three-tier Light/Deep/REM dreaming) + append-only JSONL session logs, scoped AGENTS.md hierarchy + deterministic ordering, gates (green/yellow/red/n/a with blocking-vs-informing councils), taskflow (six-state machine + 2-attempt fix-loop cap), worktree parallelism with atomic scope-checked merge, skill-creator runtime roster extension, per-agent model tiering (Opus CEO / Sonnet Chiefs / Haiku specialists), rate-limited notify, and novelty-gated memory writes. v0.3.0 'company release': Wave 1 adds durable corporate paper trail — `vision-doc` (workspace VISION.md + 3-bullet KR slice per dispatch), `okr` (per-project OKR derivation + per-report alignment + quarter roll-up), `adr` (immutable decision receipts), `meeting-minutes` (minutes for every user/board/blocking-council/red-team/audit/retro convening). Wave 2 adds Marketing + Strategy councils (CMO + CSO + 8 specialists) plus four new skills: `idea-pipeline` (4-stage gated ideation → top-5), `user-meeting` (4-phase CEO↔user selection flow with live Cowork artifact), `market-intel` (canonical artifact shapes), `positioning` (messaging canvas + narrative rubric). Wave 3 adds People-ops + Audit councils (COO + CAO + 7 specialists: roster-manager, hiring-lead, performance-reviewer, adr-auditor, gate-auditor, okr-auditor, memory-auditor) plus three new skills: `roster` (living agent registry + hire/fire/tier-change/repurpose lifecycle with mandatory ADRs and `_vision/roster/_archive/`), `audit` (independent close + portfolio paper-trail integrity, 4 audit kinds, every red → ADR), `capacity` (per-agent + per-council utilization bands + KR coverage gaps). Wave 4 adds the never-give-up resilience ladder — `ladder` skill with 8 rungs (0 Retry → 1 Fix-loop → 2 Alternate approach → 3 Cross-council → 4 Hire/repurpose via COO → 5 Scope pivot → 6 User consult → 7 Parking lot), per-rung attempt budgets, ADR per transition, Rung 7 as resumable terminal state that preserves every artifact with a reconsider-trigger. Taskflow extended with `ladderRung` field; gates reds start the ladder instead of durably blocking. Wave 5 adds the Evaluation Council (CEVO + 5 specialists: eval-designer, benchmark-runner, regression-detector, budget-monitor, token-compactor) plus two new skills: `eval` (mandatory close-eval paired with close-audit, portfolio-regression with 5 pp threshold + quarter-frozen baselines, benchmark-sweep across SWE-bench-lite / MLE-bench-lite / per-project harnesses, eval items derived from PKRs never retrofitted) and `budget` (four size classes — small 75k/$1.50, medium 250k/$5, large 1M/$20, custom — per-phase allocation, per-report burn tracking, cumulative > 110% triggers Rung 6). Token-compactor performs structured rewrites (rollup + correction pointer, never delete; never-compact list covers decisions, errors, reports, ADR-refs, meeting lines, rung transitions). Wave 6 adds the Red-Team Council (CRT + 7 specialists: adversarial-prompter, tool-abuse-tester, data-exfil-tester, model-poisoning-scout, supply-chain-attacker, social-engineering-tester, playbook-author) plus two new skills: `red-team` (OWASP ASI Top 10 2025 mapping, severity rubric reproducibility×impact×boundary×mitigation, severity → gate → ladder routing default Rung 3, five kinds: pre-release / prompt-upgrade / integration / portfolio-sweep / incident, CRT never on delivery path) and `playbook` (DGM-style stepping-stone archive under `_vision/playbooks/`, immutable stones authored from remediated high+ red-team findings, supersession-only evolution, prompt-diff review blocking gate before `agents/*.md` or `councils/*/AGENTS.md` changes land with weakening-phrasing auto-reject patterns). Wave 7 adds SRE + tool-scout + provenance.
